Buka halaman profil, pilih menu \"Riwaya: Open the profile page, select the "Visit History" menu. All places you have visited through the Edutourism feature will be recorded there. You can also mark favorite places with the star icon.
Buka halaman utama dan pilih menu \"Edut: Open the homepage and select the "Edutourism" menu. Choose an available route, then click "Start". Follow the navigation instructions to visit each point. You can also scan the QR code available at the location to start the route.
Buka menu \"Paket Wisata\" di halaman ut: Open the "Tour Packages" menu on the homepage. Select the package you want, set the schedule and number of participants, then make payment via Midtrans. An e-ticket will be sent to your email after successful payment.
Buka menu \"UMKM\" untuk melihat produk-: Open the "Merchants" menu to view local products from the Penglipuran community. You can explore various product categories and view Merchant profiles. For purchases, contact the Merchant owner directly through the available contact information.
